label: 3793 Interest on investments

children.heading: Calculation of interest
children.label: a Calculation of interest
children.text: For purposes of sections 3721 and 3792 of this title, interest shall be computed, at a rate determined by the Secretary of the Treasury, on the investment of the United States in the Panama Canal as shown in the accounts of the Panama Canal Company at the close of business on the day preceding , and as adjusted in accordance with subsections (b) and (c) of this section. Capital investment for interest purposes shall not include any interest during construction.October 1, 1979

children.heading: Increases and decreases in investment of United States
children.label: b Increases and decreases in investment of United States
A
children.text: the amount of expenditures from the Panama Canal Revolving Fund,, and1So in original.1

children.label: B
children.text: the value of property transferred to the Commission by any other department or agency of the United States, as determined in accordance with subsection (c) of this section; and

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of the funds deposited in the Panama Canal Revolving Fund,

children.label: B
children.text: the value of property transferred to the Republic of Panama pursuant to this chapter or any other Act on or after , andOctober 1, 1979

children.label: C
children.text: the value of property transferred by the Commission to any other department or agency of the United States.

children.heading: Value of property transferred to Commission
children.label: c Value of property transferred to Commission
children.text: The value of property transferred to the Commission by any other department or agency of the United States shall be determined by the Director of the Office of Management and Budget. In computing such value, such Director shall give due consideration to the cost and probable earning power of the transferred property, or the usable value to the Commission if clearly less than cost, and shall make adequate provisions for depreciation, obsolescence, and other determinable decreases in value. Insofar as practicable, the value of such transferred property shall exclude any portion of such value properly allocable to national defense.

children.heading: Payment and deposit of interest
children.label: d Payment and deposit of interest
children.text: The Panama Canal Commission shall pay to the Treasury of the United States interest on the investment of the United States, as determined under this section. Such interest shall be deposited in the general fund of the Treasury.
